Text.text: While not personally wealthy, your control over the Bay Street Financial District gives you access to a vast array of resources.
You may commit coterie Resources to Projects or other endeavors.
Your rise to power has earned the enmity of a very powerful, very mysterious enemy who will act towards your destruction at every opportunity.

Your enemy is a Difficulty 6 (!) monstrous elder, vengeful methuselah, embittered Justicar, or the equivalent, and their traits are thus free to break usual statistical limitations. Expect to feel their influence at least once per story.
You have a small fleet of luxury vehicles and drivers at your disposal.
You can call upon your drivers (Driving 6) on short notice. Once per story, you can call upon a rare or expensive vehicle such as a helicopter or bulletproof SUV for a night.

Your domain comes with certain inconvenient responsibilities: You must secure the main entry points of Union Station and the Billy Bishop Ferry (from Billy Bishop Airport, on Centre Island) against unauthorized entry by Kindred of any sect.
You gain no benefits from fulfilling your obligations, but every failure to do so will cost your coterie a dot of Status until you have made amends.
